content:
Right now it’s manual — the signed event is stored locally and you can publish it when you reconnect.

But the system also supports scheduled publishing, so a note signed earlier can automatically publish once the runtime is back online.

The key idea is that the private key is only used locally.
A hosted service can publish the already-signed artifact without ever touching the key.
